issues.description: Action is missing the DON!! cost condition. Card text states '[On K.O.] DON!! −1' meaning the ability requires paying 1 DON!! to activate. DSL must include a condition or cost mechanism for the DON!! expenditure before the KO action executes.
Missing condition to limit targeting. Card text specifies 'up to 1' but DSL has no maxCount or quantity limit on the KO action target selection.
